---
title: GPU computing 1
subtitle: "9:00 - 17:00"
date: "11 June 2026"
author: "(SURF)"
language: 
  title-block-author-single: "Taught by"
  title-block-published: "Date"
categories:
  - HPC
image: ../img/icons8-workshop-96.png
image-alt: "data center"
execute: 
  cache: true
  freeze: true
---

### What will you learn?

Learn how to accelerate Python workloads on GPUs (Part I): Understand the fundamentals and compare the performance of scientific applications.

### Objectives:


### For Whom?


### Prerequisites



<!-- <a href="link" class="button">Register here!</a> -->
